title: Miconia secunlongisepala
taxonomy: Miconia secunlongisepala is classified under the family Melastomataceae. This family consists of a large group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. Miconia secunlongisepala belongs to the genus Miconia, which comprises over 1,000 species of epiphytic and terrestrial plants. The species is native to the Americas, specifically found in Central and South America. Miconia secunlongisepala is further classified within the Melastomataceae family as a member of the tribe Miconieae.
